title: Paper Cups - Double Wall Coffee Cup - Unique Aqueous Lining, Plastic-Free - Certified Home & Industrial Compostable - 8 oz - Biodegradable for Hot & Cold Drinks 25 Pcs (No Lids)
features: Eco-Friendly & Compostable - Our paper cups party feature a unique aqueous lining that makes them 100% home compostable within 24 weeks. Designed with sustainability in mind, these cups break down naturally, reducing environmental impact

Perfect for Hot & Cold Drinks - These disposable cups are built for both hot and cold beverages. Whether you're serving coffee, tea, or iced drinks, their double-wall design ensures your beverages stay secure and maintain the perfect temperature

Leakproof & Durable - Enjoy your drinks without worrying about leaks. Our coffee cups disposable are made from strong, eco-friendly materials and can be paired with our 90mm Bagasse lids for a secure, sustainable option for all your beverages

Sustainable & Biodegradable - These coffee cups are fully biodegradable and recyclable, made from sustainable paperboard. With a unique aqueous lining, they can be composted at home or in industrial facilities, supporting a greener, waste-free planet

Versatile & Convenient - Ideal for any occasion, these compostable cups are microwave, oven, and refrigerator safe. Whether you're hosting a party or enjoying a daily coffee, our cups offer an eco-friendly, reliable solution for every need
